TITLE: Engagement Summary
CONTENT:
Your Tax Rescue Plan – How It Works,
• Engagement: $500 to start,$500 once documents are received (total $1,000).,,,,,,,,,,,
• Penalty Abatement: $500 when filed,$500 when approved (total $2,000).,,,,,,,,,,,
• Performance Gates: Each 20% reduction in your balance triggers a $500 payment (up to five gates).,,,,,,,,,,,,,
• Refund Bonus: If your balance flips into a refund,I take 10% of the refund — but your total fees will never exceed $5,000.,,,,,,,,,,,
Your Protection,,,,,,,,,,,,,
• Maximum you’ll ever pay: $5,000 (cap).,,,,,,,,,,,,
• Minimum exposure: $1,000.,,,,,,,,,,,,
• Payments only follow results.
Text:
## Engagement Summary: Your Tax Rescue Plan – How It Works,,,,,,,,,,,,
### Engagement Overview,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Initial Payment: $500 to start,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Document Submission Payment: $500 once documents are received,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Total Engagement Cost: $1,000,,,,,,,,,,,,
### Penalty Abatement,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Filing Fee: $500 when filed,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Approval Fee: $500 when approved,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Total Penalty Abatement Cost: $2,000,,,,,,,,,,,,
### Performance Gates,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Payment Structure: Each 20% reduction in your balance triggers a $500 payment (up to five gates).,,,,,,,,,,,,,
### Refund Bonus,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Refund Policy: If your balance turns into a refund,I take 10% of the refund. However,your total fees will never exceed $5,000.,,,,,,,,,,
### Your Protection,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Maximum Payment: $5,000 cap,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Minimum Exposure: $1,000,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Payment Terms: Payments are contingent upon results.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
This plan ensures that your financial commitment is limited while maximizing your potential for savings. Let's get started on your tax rescue journey!

TITLE: Scope of Services
CONTENT:
Consultant shall:,
• Review and analyze Client’s prior federal and state tax returns for tax years 2022 and 2023.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
• Prepare and file amended federal and/or state returns (Forms 1040X and state equivalents).,,,,,,,,,,,,,
• Prepare and file one penalty abatement request with the Internal Revenue Service (IRS).,,,,,,,,,,,,,
Excluded Services:,,,,,,,,,,,,,
• Responses to IRS/state audits,examinations,or additional notices beyond the initial abatement and amended filings.,,,,,,,,,,,
• Litigation,appeals,collection defense,or services not expressly listed above.,,,,,,,,,,
• Additional tax years beyond 2022–2023 (unless added by written amendment).
Text:
## Scope of Services,,,,,,,,,,,,
### Agreement Overview,,,,,,,,,,,,,
As part of our engagement,the Consultant will provide the following services:,,,,,,,,,,,,
1. Tax Return Review:,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Analyze the Client’s federal and state tax returns for the tax years 2022 and 2023 to identify potential issues and areas for improvement.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
2. Amended Returns Preparation:,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Prepare and file amended federal returns (Form 1040X) and any necessary state equivalents to correct any discrepancies.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
3. Penalty Abatement Request:,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Prepare and submit one penalty abatement request to the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) to seek relief from penalties.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
### Excluded Services,,,,,,,,,,,,,
Please note that the following services are not included in this agreement:,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Responses to any IRS or state audits,examinations,or additional notices beyond the initial abatement and amended filings.,,,,,,,,,,,
- Litigation,appeals,collection defense,or any services not expressly listed above.,,,,,,,,,,
- Preparation of tax returns for additional years beyond 2022 and 2023 unless otherwise agreed upon in writing.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
For any questions or additional services,please feel free to contact us.

TITLE: Definitions
CONTENT:
“Savings”: Reduction of Client’s outstanding balance (tax,penalties
“Refund”: Any net positive cash issued by IRS or state taxing authority.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
“Performance Gate”: Each incremental level of savings achieved,defined in 20% bands under the Payment Schedule.,,,,,,,,,,,,
“Cumulative Paid”: Total amount invoiced and received by Consultant at any point under this Agreement.
Text:
### Definitions,,,,,,,,,,,,
1. Savings: This refers to the reduction of the Client’s outstanding balance,including taxes,penalties,and interest,as documented in IRS or state records following the processing of amended returns and abatement filings.,,,,,,,,,
2. Refund: This is defined as any net positive cash amount issued by the IRS or state taxing authority.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
3. Performance Gate: This represents each incremental level of savings achieved,categorized in 20% bands under the Payment Schedule.,,,,,,,,,,,,
4. Cumulative Paid: This term denotes the total amount invoiced and received by the Consultant at any time during the duration of this Agreement.

## Client Responsibilities,,,,,,,,,,
As part of our agreement,clients are expected to adhere to the following responsibilities to ensure a smooth and efficient collaboration:,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Provide Accurate Documentation: Clients must submit accurate,complete,and timely records,receipts,and any supporting documentation necessary for the project.,,,,,,,,,
- Prompt Response: Clients are required to respond swiftly to any information requests to facilitate ongoing processes and decision-making.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Tax Obligations: Clients retain full responsibility for their tax obligations,including filings and payments,which extend beyond the defined scope of the Consultant's services.,,,,,,,,,,,
By fulfilling these responsibilities,clients will contribute to a successful partnership and project outcomes.

TITLE: Consultant Responsibilities
CONTENT:
• Prepare amendments and penalty abatement professionally,using commercially reasonable efforts.
• Maintain confidentiality of client records and sensitive information.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
• File only after the payment schedule is current and required authorizations are received.
Text:
## Consultant Responsibilities,,,,,,,,,,,,
As a consultant,you are entrusted with several key responsibilities that ensure the smooth operation and integrity of client relationships. These responsibilities include:,,,,,,,,,,,,
1. Preparation of Amendments and Penalty Abatement: You are expected to prepare any amendments and penalty abatement documentation with a high level of professionalism,employing commercially reasonable efforts to meet the needs of the client.,,,,,,,,,,,,
2. Confidentiality Maintenance: It is crucial to maintain confidentiality regarding client records and sensitive information. This ensures trust and compliance with privacy standards.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
3. Filing Procedures: Ensure that all filings are completed only after the payment schedule is current and that all necessary authorizations have been received. This step is essential to maintain operational integrity and compliance with agreed terms.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
By adhering to these responsibilities,you contribute to the effectiveness and credibility of the consultancy service provided.

TITLE: Accountant’s Lien
CONTENT: Accountant’s Lien: Consultant retains a lien on all prepared documents and filings until fees are fully paid.
Text:
## Accountant’s Lien
In accordance with our agreement,please be advised that the consultant retains a lien on all prepared documents and filings until all fees are fully paid. This provision ensures that the consultant has a legal claim on the work produced until compensation is received,safeguarding the financial interests of the consultant throughout the engagement.

TITLE: Non-Disparagement
CONTENT: Non-Disparagement: Client shall not publish or communicate disparaging remarks about Consultant in any medium.
Text:
## Non-Disparagement Agreement
This Non-Disparagement clause is a critical component of the agreement between the Client and the Consultant. It ensures that both parties maintain a professional relationship even after the completion of their engagement.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
### Key Terms,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Client Obligations: The Client agrees not to publish or communicate any disparaging remarks about the Consultant in any form of media. This includes but is not limited to social media,blogs,interviews,and public statements.,,,,,,,,,,
### Importance,,,,,,,,,,,,,
This clause is designed to protect the reputation and integrity of the Consultant,thereby fostering a respectful and professional environment for both parties.,,,,,,,,,,,,
### Enforcement,,,,,,,,,,,,,
Failure to comply with this Non-Disparagement clause may result in legal action or other remedies as outlined in the agreement.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
### Conclusion,,,,,,,,,,,,,
Upholding this Non-Disparagement agreement is essential for preserving the professional integrity of both the Client and the Consultant.

CONTENT: Confidentiality & Non-Disclosure: All information is confidential except as required by law or to file with tax authorities.
Text:
## Confidentiality & Non-Disclosure Agreement
This Confidentiality & Non-Disclosure Agreement outlines the terms under which information is considered confidential. All information disclosed under this agreement is strictly confidential unless disclosure is mandated by law or required for filing with tax authorities.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Confidential Information: All information shared under this agreement is deemed confidential.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Exceptions: Disclosure is permitted only as required by law or for tax-related filings.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Obligations: Parties must ensure that confidential information is protected and not shared without proper authorization.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
Maintaining confidentiality is crucial for protecting sensitive information and ensuring compliance with legal obligations. This agreement fosters trust between parties and safeguards proprietary information.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
By adhering to this agreement,all parties contribute to a secure and trustworthy environment for information sharing.

CONTENT:
Professional Conduct: Client agrees to patience,respect

As a client,you are expected to uphold the following standards of professional conduct:,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Patience: Understand that processes may take time,and cooperation is essential for successful outcomes.,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Respect: Treat all parties involved with dignity and courtesy,fostering a positive working relationship.,,,,,,,,,,,,

By adhering to these guidelines,we can ensure a productive and respectful working relationship.

TITLE: Termination
CONTENT: Either party may terminate with written notice. Client remains responsible for fees earned through termination. Consultant will not release or file any work until all balances are paid.
Text:
### Termination Clause
This termination clause outlines the conditions under which either party may end the agreement.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Notice Requirement: Either party may terminate the agreement by providing written notice to the other party.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Client Responsibilities: The client remains liable for all fees incurred up to the point of termination.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
- Consultant's Rights: The consultant will retain ownership of all work produced and will not release or file any work until all outstanding balances have been settled.,,,,,,,,,,,,,
Ensure that all communications regarding termination are documented in writing to avoid any disputes.
